title: Mind Sap can target magic-immune creature during summon response

card.rawText: At any point during the game, play this card from your hand. Negate the equipped creature's effects. While equipped, this card acts as an Infinite equip magic card.

plan.title: Mind Sap can target magic-immune creature during summon response
plan.summary: Play Mind Sap against an opponent magic-immune creature while its summon response window is still open.

notes: Opponent has just summoned a magic-immune creature.
Keep the summon response window open for that magic-immune creature.

steps: Player_1 plays Mind Sap from hand during the summon response window.
Choose the opponent magic-immune primary creature.
Resolve the equip and creature-effect negation.

expectedAssertions.label: Mind Sap target prompt was created
Mind Sap equipped to the magic-immune creature

manualVerification: Confirm the summon response window exception is limited to the creature just summoned.
riskNotes: Magic immunity should not block Mind Sap until the summon response window closes.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Mind Sap timing exception for magic-immune summoned creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
